title: Physically validate LilyGO battery PMIC and power telemetry
description: Follow-up split from project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.8. HAL power provider code and native_sim/qemu emulation tests cover voltage-divider, fuel-gauge, and charger paths, but LilyGO board battery ADC/PMIC/charger wiring needs real hardware. Validate each selected LilyGO target reports provider present/unavailable correctly; battery percent or voltage, charging, external power, power-hold/shutdown, wake buttons, and any missing devicetree aliases are recorded with exact board revision and logs.
